---
title: "EU Regional GDP"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: full
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    echo: false
    warning: false
    message: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
        <style>
          body, html { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; background-color: #ffffff; }

          /* Header */
          .app-header {
            background-color: #526DB0;
            border-radius: 12px;
            overflow: hidden;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
            margin-bottom: 16px;
          }
          .app-header h1 {
            color: white;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            text-align: center;
            margin: 0;
          }

          /* Tabs */
          .nav-tabs {
            background-color: #526DB0;
            padding: 0 16px;
            border-bottom: none;
            margin-bottom: 0;
            border-radius: 0;
          }
          .nav-tabs .nav-link {
            color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
            border: none; border-radius: 0;
            padding: 10px 16px;
          }
          .nav-tabs .nav-link.active {
            color: #FCC201;
            background-color: transparent;
            border-bottom: 3px solid #FCC201;
            border-top: none; border-left: none; border-right: none;
          }
          .nav-tabs .nav-link:hover { color: #FCC201; }
          .tab-content { background-color: #ffffff; padding-top: 16px; }

          /* Controls card */
          .controls-card {
            background: #F8F8F8;
            border: 1px solid #A0B8C8;
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 10px 16px;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
          }
          .controls-row {
            display: flex;
            align-items: flex-end;
            gap: 12px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
          }
          .controls-row > div { flex: 1; min-width: 150px; margin-bottom: 0; }
          .controls-row label { font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 4px; display: block; }
          .controls-row select, .controls-row input[type=range] { width: 100%; }
          .slider-row { margin-top: 10px; }

          /* Value boxes */
          .vboxes-row {
            display: flex;
            gap: 12px;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
          }
          .vbox {
            flex: 1;
            min-width: 150px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
          }
          .vbox-icon { font-size: 1.6rem; opacity: 0.85; }
          .vbox-content { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
          .vbox-title { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 2px; }
          .vbox-value { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; }

          /* Cards */
          .plot-card, .table-card {
            border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            overflow: hidden;
          }
          .card-header-custom {
            background: #f8f9fa;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;
            padding: 8px 16px;
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
          }
          .card-body-custom { padding: 8px; }

          /* Year slider styling */
          input[type=range] { accent-color: #526DB0; }

          /* DT buttons */
          a.btn-dt {
            background-color: #A0B8C8 !important;
            border-color: #A0B8C8 !important;
            color: white !important;
            font-size: 0.8rem !important;
          }

          /* Selectize z-index fix */
          .selectize-dropdown { z-index: 9999 !important; }
        </style>
---

```{r setup}
library(arrow)
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
library(DT)
library(htmltools)
library(crosstalk)

# ── Constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

YEAR_MIN <- 2011L
YEAR_MAX <- 2024L

VARS_X <- c(
  "GDP (millions EUR)"      = "MIO_EUR",
  "GDP (millions PPS 2020)" = "MIO_PPS_EU27_2020"
)

VARS_Y <- c(
  "GDP per capita (EUR)"          = "EUR_HAB",
  "GDP per capita (PPS 2020)"     = "PPS_EU27_2020_HAB",
  "GDP per capita index (EU=100)" = "PPS_HAB_EU27_2020"
)

VARS_X_LABELS <- c(
  "M€ nominal"  = "MIO_EUR",
  "M€ PPS 2020" = "MIO_PPS_EU27_2020"
)

VARS_Y_LABELS <- c(
  "€ p.c."       = "EUR_HAB",
  "PPS p.c."     = "PPS_EU27_2020_HAB",
  "Index EU=100" = "PPS_HAB_EU27_2020"
)

COUNTRIES <- c(
  "Germany"     = "DE", "Italy"       = "IT", "France"      = "FR",
  "Poland"      = "PL", "Belgium"     = "BE", "Bulgaria"    = "BG",
  "Greece"      = "EL", "Czechia"     = "CZ", "Denmark"     = "DK",
  "Estonia"     = "EE", "Ireland"     = "IE", "Spain"       = "ES",
  "Croatia"     = "HR", "Cyprus"      = "CY", "Latvia"      = "LV",
  "Lithuania"   = "LT", "Luxembourg"  = "LU", "Hungary"     = "HU",
  "Malta"       = "MT", "Netherlands" = "NL", "Austria"     = "AT",
  "Portugal"    = "PT", "Romania"     = "RO", "Slovenia"    = "SI",
  "Slovakia"    = "SK", "Finland"     = "FI", "Sweden"      = "SE"
)
country_names <- setNames(names(COUNTRIES), COUNTRIES)

PARA <- list(
  col_other   = "#526DB0",
  col_eu_line = "#7A7A7A",
  col_country = "#FCC201",
  col_accent  = "#A0B8C8",
  col_accent2 = "#18bc9c"
)

# ── Scatter plot function ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

plot_eu_nuts2_scatter <- function(df_plot,
                                  list_country,
                                  list_eu,
                                  selected_country,
                                  varx,
                                  vary,
                                  year,
                                  label_x = varx,
                                  label_y = vary,
                                  p       = list()) {
  col_other   <- p$col_other
  col_eu_line <- p$col_eu_line
  col_country <- p$col_country
  col_accent  <- p$col_accent

  country_names        <- setNames(names(COUNTRIES), COUNTRIES)
  df_plot$country_name <- country_names[df_plot$country]

  df_other       <- df_plot[df_plot$country != selected_country, ]
  df_other_cap   <- df_other[df_other$capital == "Sí", ]
  df_other_nocap <- df_other[df_other$capital != "Sí", ]

  df_country <- df_plot[df_plot$country == selected_country, ]
  df_cap     <- df_country[df_country$capital == "Sí", ]
  df_nocap   <- df_country[df_country$capital != "Sí", ]

  make_hover <- function(d) {
    paste0(
      "<b>", d$name, "</b> (", d$code, ") [", d$namelat, "]<br>",
      "Country: ", d$country_name, "<br>",
      label_x, ": ", formatC(d[[varx]], format = "fg", big.mark = ","), "<br>",
      "Ranking ", label_x, ": ", d$rankx, "<br>",
      label_y, ": ", formatC(d[[vary]], format = "fg", big.mark = ","), "<br>",
      "Ranking ", label_y, ": ", d$ranky
    )
  }

  fig <- plot_ly()

  if (nrow(df_other_nocap) > 0)
    fig <- fig %>% add_trace(
      data = df_other_nocap, x = df_other_nocap[[varx]], y = df_other_nocap[[vary]],
      type = "scatter", mode = "markers", name = "Other EU regions", legendrank = 4,
      marker = list(color = col_other, size = 7, symbol = "circle",
                    opacity = 1, line = list(width = 0.4, color = col_other)),
      text = make_hover(df_other_nocap), hoverinfo = "text",
      hoverlabel = list(bgcolor = col_other, font = list(color = "white", size = 11))
    )

  if (nrow(df_other_cap) > 0)
    fig <- fig %>% add_trace(
      data = df_other_cap, x = df_other_cap[[varx]], y = df_other_cap[[vary]],
      type = "scatter", mode = "markers", name = "Other EU capitals", legendrank = 3,
      marker = list(color = col_accent, size = 7, symbol = "circle",
                    opacity = 1, line = list(width = 0.4, color = col_accent)),
      text = make_hover(df_other_cap), hoverinfo = "text",
      hoverlabel = list(bgcolor = col_other, font = list(color = "white", size = 11))
    )

  if (nrow(df_nocap) > 0)
    fig <- fig %>% add_trace(
      data = df_nocap, x = df_nocap[[varx]], y = df_nocap[[vary]],
      type = "scatter", mode = "markers",
      name = paste0("Other ", selected_country, " regions"), legendrank = 2,
      marker = list(color = col_country, size = 7, symbol = "circle",
                    opacity = 1, line = list(width = 0.4, color = col_country)),
      text = make_hover(df_nocap), hoverinfo = "text",
      hoverlabel = list(bgcolor = col_country, font = list(color = "white", size = 11))
    )

  if (nrow(df_cap) > 0)
    fig <- fig %>% add_trace(
      data = df_cap, x = df_cap[[varx]], y = df_cap[[vary]],
      type = "scatter", mode = "markers",
      name = paste0(selected_country, " Capital (", df_cap$code, ")"), legendrank = 1,
      marker = list(color = col_country, size = 9, symbol = "square",
                    opacity = 1, line = list(width = 0.6, color = col_country)),
      text = make_hover(df_cap), hoverinfo = "text",
      hoverlabel = list(bgcolor = col_country, font = list(color = "white", size = 11))
    )

  fig %>%
    layout(
      plot_bgcolor  = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      title = list(
        text    = paste0("EU NUTS2 GDP Dispersion \u2013 ", year),
        font    = list(size = 16, color = "#222"),
        x       = 0.5, xanchor = "center"
      ),
      xaxis = list(
        title = label_x, showline = TRUE, linecolor = "#bbb",
        zeroline = FALSE, showgrid = FALSE, ticks = "outside", tickcolor = "#bbb"
      ),
      yaxis = list(
        title = label_y, showline = TRUE, linecolor = "#bbb",
        zeroline = FALSE, showgrid = TRUE,
        gridcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0.07)", gridwidth = 1,
        ticks = "outside", tickcolor = "#bbb"
      ),
      legend = list(
        orientation = "h", x = 1, y = -0.15,
        xanchor = "right", yanchor = "top",
        bgcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,1)", borderwidth = 0,
        font = list(size = 12)
      ),
      margin   = list(l = 60, r = 20, t = 70, b = 110, pad = 4),
      autosize = TRUE,
      hovermode = "closest"
    ) %>%
    config(
      responsive             = TRUE,
      displayModeBar         = FALSE,
      modeBarButtonsToRemove = list("lasso2d", "select2d"),
      displaylogo            = FALSE
    )
}

# ── Load full dataset into memory ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# (needed for JS-driven filtering in static HTML)

ds_full <- open_dataset("./data/gdp_eurostat_nuts2+0.parquet") %>%
  filter(
    var    %in% c("MIO_EUR", "MIO_PPS_EU27_2020",
                  "EUR_HAB", "PPS_EU27_2020_HAB", "PPS_HAB_EU27_2020"),
    nombre != "Extra-Regio NUTS 2"
  ) %>%
  collect()

# ── Default parameters ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
default_year    <- YEAR_MAX
default_varx    <- "MIO_PPS_EU27_2020"
default_vary    <- "PPS_HAB_EU27_2020"
default_country <- "ES"

# ── Helper: build df_plot for a given combination ────────────────────────────
make_df_plot <- function(year, varx, vary) {
  ds_full %>%
    filter(ano == year, var %in% c(varx, vary), level == 2L) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = var, values_from = valor) %>%
    mutate(
      country = substr(code, 1, 2),
      rankx   = rank(-get(varx), na.last = "keep", ties.method = "min"),
      ranky   = rank(-get(vary),  na.last = "keep", ties.method = "min")
    )
}

make_list_country <- function(year, varx, vary, country) {
  ds_full %>%
    filter(ano == year, var %in% c(varx, vary), code == country) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = var, values_from = valor) %>%
    select(any_of(c(varx, vary))) %>%
    as.list()
}

make_list_eu <- function(year, varx, vary) {
  ds_full %>%
    filter(ano == year, var %in% c(varx, vary), code == "EU27_2020") %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = var, values_from = valor) %>%
    select(any_of(c(varx, vary))) %>%
    as.list()
}

# ── Precompute ALL combinations and serialise to JSON ─────────────────────────
# Years × varx (2) × vary (3) × country (27) — rendered once, filtered in JS

all_years    <- seq(YEAR_MIN, YEAR_MAX)
all_varx     <- unname(VARS_X)      # "MIO_EUR", "MIO_PPS_EU27_2020"
all_vary     <- unname(VARS_Y)      # 3 values
all_countries <- unname(COUNTRIES)  # 27 ISO codes

# Build a single wide data frame with all year×varx×vary combos (no country dim
# needed — country is purely a visual highlight; the underlying points are the
# same for a given year/varx/vary triplet).

all_combos <- expand.grid(
  year = all_years,
  varx = all_varx,
  vary = all_vary,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# For each combo compute the serialisable region rows
combo_data <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(all_combos)), function(i) {
  yr  <- all_combos$year[i]
  vx  <- all_combos$varx[i]
  vy  <- all_combos$vary[i]

  df <- make_df_plot(yr, vx, vy)
  if (!nrow(df)) return(NULL)

  df %>%
    mutate(country_name = country_names[country]) %>%
    select(code, name, namelat, capital, country, country_name,
           rankx, ranky,
           vx_val = all_of(vx),
           vy_val = all_of(vy))
})
names(combo_data) <- paste(all_combos$year, all_combos$varx,
                           all_combos$vary, sep = "|")

# EU reference values for every combo
eu_data <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(all_combos)), function(i) {
  yr <- all_combos$year[i]
  vx <- all_combos$varx[i]
  vy <- all_combos$vary[i]
  eu <- make_list_eu(yr, vx, vy)
  list(vx = eu[[vx]], vy = eu[[vy]])
})
names(eu_data) <- names(combo_data)

# Country reference values: year × varx × vary × country
country_combos <- expand.grid(
  year    = all_years,
  varx    = all_varx,
  vary    = all_vary,
  country = all_countries,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
country_data <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(country_combos)), function(i) {
  yr  <- country_combos$year[i]
  vx  <- country_combos$varx[i]
  vy  <- country_combos$vary[i]
  ct  <- country_combos$country[i]
  lc  <- make_list_country(yr, vx, vy, ct)
  list(vx = lc[[vx]], vy = lc[[vy]])
})
names(country_data) <- paste(country_combos$year, country_combos$varx,
                             country_combos$vary, country_combos$country, sep = "|")

# Serialise to JSON (embedded in page)
json_combo   <- jsonlite::toJSON(combo_data,   auto_unbox = TRUE, na = "null")
json_eu      <- jsonlite::toJSON(eu_data,      auto_unbox = TRUE, na = "null")
json_country <- jsonlite::toJSON(country_data, auto_unbox = TRUE, na = "null")
```

```{r ui, results='asis'}
# ── Static HTML shell ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# Build country <option> list
country_opts <- paste0(
  mapply(function(name, iso) {
    sel <- if (iso == default_country) " selected" else ""
    sprintf('<option value="%s"%s>%s</option>', iso, sel, name)
  }, names(COUNTRIES), unname(COUNTRIES)),
  collapse = "\n"
)

# Year tick marks
year_marks <- paste0(
  '<datalist id="year-ticks">',
  paste0(sprintf('<option value="%d"></option>', all_years), collapse = ""),
  '</datalist>'
)

cat(sprintf('
<div class="app-header">
  <h1>&#127758; EU Regional GDP</h1>
  <ul class="nav nav-tabs" id="mainTabs" role="tablist">
    <li class="nav-item">
      <a class="nav-link" href="#tab-nuts0" data-bs-toggle="tab">&#127758; NUTS0</a>
    </li>
    <li class="nav-item">
      <a class="nav-link active" href="#tab-nuts2" data-bs-toggle="tab">&#128200; NUTS2</a>
    </li>
  </ul>
</div>

<div class="tab-content">

  <!-- NUTS0 placeholder -->
  <div class="tab-pane fade" id="tab-nuts0">
    <p style="color:#888;padding:24px;">NUTS0 content coming soon.</p>
  </div>

  <!-- NUTS2 -->
  <div class="tab-pane fade show active" id="tab-nuts2">

    <!-- Controls -->
    <div class="controls-card">
      <div class="controls-row">
        <div>
          <label for="sel-varx">GDP Var</label>
          <select id="sel-varx" class="form-select form-select-sm">
            <option value="MIO_EUR">M&euro; nominal</option>
            <option value="MIO_PPS_EU27_2020" selected>M&euro; PPS 2020</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div>
          <label for="sel-vary">GDP p.c. Var</label>
          <select id="sel-vary" class="form-select form-select-sm">
            <option value="EUR_HAB">&euro; p.c.</option>
            <option value="PPS_EU27_2020_HAB">PPS p.c.</option>
            <option value="PPS_HAB_EU27_2020" selected>Index EU=100</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div>
          <label for="sel-country">Country</label>
          <select id="sel-country" class="form-select form-select-sm">
            %s
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="controls-row slider-row">
        <div style="flex:1;">
          <label for="sel-year">Year: <span id="year-label">%d</span></label>
          <input type="range" id="sel-year" min="%d" max="%d" value="%d"
                 step="1" list="year-ticks" style="width:100%%;">
          %s
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Value boxes -->
    <div class="vboxes-row">
      <div class="vbox" style="background:%s; color:white;">
        <div class="vbox-icon">&#128506;</div>
        <div class="vbox-content">
          <div class="vbox-title">NUTS2 regions</div>
          <div class="vbox-value" id="vb-regions">—</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="vbox" style="background:%s; color:white;">
        <div class="vbox-icon">&#127758;</div>
        <div class="vbox-content">
          <div class="vbox-title">EU avg GDP p.c.</div>
          <div class="vbox-value" id="vb-eu-y">—</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="vbox" style="background:%s; color:#222;">
        <div class="vbox-icon">&#127987;</div>
        <div class="vbox-content">
          <div class="vbox-title">Country avg GDP p.c.</div>
          <div class="vbox-value" id="vb-ct-y">—</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="vbox" style="background:%s; color:#222;">
        <div class="vbox-icon">&#127942;</div>
        <div class="vbox-content">
          <div class="vbox-title">Top GDP p.c. region</div>
          <div class="vbox-value" id="vb-top" style="font-size:0.85rem;">—</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Scatter plot -->
    <div class="plot-card">
      <div class="card-header-custom" id="plot-title-header">
        GDP per capita vs GDP — %d
      </div>
      <div class="card-body-custom">
        <div id="scatter-plot" style="width:100%%;height:520px;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Data table -->
    <div class="table-card">
      <div class="card-header-custom">Region data</div>
      <div class="card-body-custom">
        <table id="region-table" class="display hover compact" style="width:100%%"></table>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- /tab-nuts2 -->
</div><!-- /tab-content -->
',
  country_opts,
  default_year, YEAR_MIN, YEAR_MAX, default_year,
  year_marks,
  PARA$col_other, PARA$col_eu_line, PARA$col_accent, PARA$col_country,
  default_year
))
```

```{r embed-data, results='asis', include=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
# Embed all precomputed data + Plotly + DataTables JS logic
cat(sprintf('
<script>
// ── Embedded data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const COMBO_DATA   = %s;
const EU_DATA      = %s;
const COUNTRY_DATA = %s;

const VARS_X_MAP = {
  "MIO_EUR":            "GDP (millions EUR)",
  "MIO_PPS_EU27_2020":  "GDP (millions PPS 2020)"
};
const VARS_Y_MAP = {
  "EUR_HAB":            "GDP per capita (EUR)",
  "PPS_EU27_2020_HAB":  "GDP per capita (PPS 2020)",
  "PPS_HAB_EU27_2020":  "GDP per capita index (EU=100)"
};
const COL_OTHER   = "%s";
const COL_EU_LINE = "%s";
const COL_COUNTRY = "%s";
const COL_ACCENT  = "%s";
const COL_ACCENT2 = "%s";

// ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function fmtNum(v, digits) {
  if (v == null || isNaN(v)) return "N/A";
  return Number(v).toLocaleString("en-US", {
    minimumFractionDigits: digits,
    maximumFractionDigits: digits
  });
}

function comboKey(year, varx, vary)          { return year+"|"+varx+"|"+vary; }
function countryKey(year, varx, vary, country){ return year+"|"+varx+"|"+vary+"|"+country; }

// ── State ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
let currentVarx    = "MIO_PPS_EU27_2020";
let currentVary    = "PPS_HAB_EU27_2020";
let currentCountry = "ES";
let currentYear    = %d;
let dtTable        = null;

// ── DataTable init (empty, filled on first render) ────────────────────────────
function initDT() {
  dtTable = $("#region-table").DataTable({
    columns: [
      { title: "Code",    className: "dt-center" },
      { title: "Region" },
      { title: "Country", className: "dt-center" },
      { title: "Capital", className: "dt-center" },
      { title: "Year",    className: "dt-center" },
      { title: "GDP X" },
      { title: "GDP Y" }
    ],
    pageLength : 15,
    scrollX    : true,
    dom        : "Bfrtip",
    buttons    : [
      { extend: "csv",   text: "CSV",   className: "btn-dt" },
      { extend: "excel", text: "Excel", className: "btn-dt" }
    ],
    rowCallback: function(row, data, index) {
      var color = (index %% 2 === 0) ? "#ffffff" : "#f8f8f8";
      $(row).css("background-color", color);
      $("td", row).css("background-color", color);
    },
    initComplete: function() {
      $("a.btn-dt").css({
        "background-color": COL_ACCENT,
        "border-color"    : COL_ACCENT,
        "color"           : "white",
        "font-size"       : "0.8rem"
      });
    }
  });
}

// ── Main render ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function render() {
  const year    = currentYear;
  const varx    = currentVarx;
  const vary    = currentVary;
  const country = currentCountry;
  const key     = comboKey(year, varx, vary);
  const rows    = COMBO_DATA[key];

  if (!rows || rows.length === 0) return;

  const labelX = VARS_X_MAP[varx] || varx;
  const labelY = VARS_Y_MAP[vary] || vary;

  // ── Value boxes ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  document.getElementById("vb-regions").textContent = rows.length;

  const euKey = key;
  const eu    = EU_DATA[euKey] || {};
  document.getElementById("vb-eu-y").textContent = fmtNum(eu.vy, 1);

  const ctKey = countryKey(year, varx, vary, country);
  const ct    = COUNTRY_DATA[ctKey] || {};
  document.getElementById("vb-ct-y").textContent = fmtNum(ct.vy, 1);

  // Top region
  let topVal = -Infinity, topName = "N/A";
  rows.forEach(r => {
    if (r.vy_val != null && r.vy_val > topVal) {
      topVal  = r.vy_val;
      topName = r.name + " (" + fmtNum(r.vy_val, 1) + ")";
    }
  });
  document.getElementById("vb-top").textContent = topName;

  // ── Plot title ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  document.getElementById("plot-title-header").textContent =
    labelY + " vs " + labelX + " \u2013 " + year;

  // ── Scatter traces ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const otherNocap = rows.filter(r => r.country !== country && r.capital !== "Sí");
  const otherCap   = rows.filter(r => r.country !== country && r.capital === "Sí");
  const ctNocap    = rows.filter(r => r.country === country && r.capital !== "Sí");
  const ctCap      = rows.filter(r => r.country === country && r.capital === "Sí");

  const makeHover = d => d.name + " (" + d.code + ") [" + d.namelat + "]<br>" +
    "Country: " + (d.country_name || d.country) + "<br>" +
    labelX + ": " + fmtNum(d.vx_val, 0) + "<br>" +
    "Ranking " + labelX + ": " + d.rankx + "<br>" +
    labelY + ": " + fmtNum(d.vy_val, 1) + "<br>" +
    "Ranking " + labelY + ": " + d.ranky;

  const mkTrace = (subset, name, color, symbol, size, lrank) => ({
    x: subset.map(r => r.vx_val),
    y: subset.map(r => r.vy_val),
    text: subset.map(makeHover),
    type: "scatter", mode: "markers",
    name, legendrank: lrank,
    marker: { color, size, symbol, opacity: 1,
               line: { width: 0.4, color } },
    hoverinfo: "text",
    hoverlabel: { bgcolor: color, font: { color: "white", size: 11 } }
  });

  const traces = [];
  if (otherNocap.length) traces.push(mkTrace(otherNocap, "Other EU regions",     COL_OTHER,   "circle", 7, 4));
  if (otherCap.length)   traces.push(mkTrace(otherCap,   "Other EU capitals",    COL_ACCENT,  "circle", 7, 3));
  if (ctNocap.length)    traces.push(mkTrace(ctNocap,    "Other "+country+" regions", COL_COUNTRY, "circle", 7, 2));
  if (ctCap.length) {
    const capName = country + " Capital (" + (ctCap[0]||{}).code + ")";
    traces.push(mkTrace(ctCap, capName, COL_COUNTRY, "square", 9, 1));
  }

  const layout = {
    plot_bgcolor : "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    title: {
      text: "EU NUTS2 GDP Dispersion \u2013 " + year,
      font: { size: 16, color: "#222" }, x: 0.5, xanchor: "center"
    },
    xaxis: { title: labelX, showline: true, linecolor: "#bbb",
             zeroline: false, showgrid: false, ticks: "outside", tickcolor: "#bbb" },
    yaxis: { title: labelY, showline: true, linecolor: "#bbb",
             zeroline: false, showgrid: true,
             gridcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0.07)", gridwidth: 1,
             ticks: "outside", tickcolor: "#bbb" },
    legend: { orientation: "h", x: 1, y: -0.15,
              xanchor: "right", yanchor: "top",
              bgcolor: "rgba(255,255,255,1)", borderwidth: 0,
              font: { size: 12 } },
    margin: { l: 60, r: 20, t: 70, b: 110, pad: 4 },
    hovermode: "closest"
  };

  Plotly.react("scatter-plot", traces, layout, { responsive: true, displayModeBar: false });

  // ── DataTable ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const tableRows = rows.map(r => [
    r.code, r.name || r.namelat, r.country_name || r.country, r.capital, year,
    r.vx_val == null ? "" : Number(r.vx_val).toFixed(0),
    r.vy_val == null ? "" : Number(r.vy_val).toFixed(1)
  ]);

  // Sort by country then desc vy
  tableRows.sort((a, b) => {
    if (a[2] < b[2]) return -1;
    if (a[2] > b[2]) return  1;
    return parseFloat(b[6]) - parseFloat(a[6]);
  });

  if (dtTable) {
    dtTable.clear().rows.add(tableRows).draw(false);
    // Re-apply bar fill on y column (index 6)
    const yVals = rows.map(r => r.vy_val).filter(v => v != null);
    const yMax  = Math.max(...yVals);
    dtTable.rows().every(function(idx) {
      const node = this.node();
      const td   = $("td:eq(6)", node);
      const val  = parseFloat(td.text());
      if (!isNaN(val) && yMax > 0) {
        const pct = (val / yMax * 100).toFixed(1);
        td.css({
          "background": "linear-gradient(90deg, " + COL_ACCENT2 + " " + pct + "%%, transparent " + pct + "%%)",
          "background-size": "100%% 90%%",
          "background-repeat": "no-repeat",
          "background-position": "center"
        });
      }
    });
    $("a.btn-dt").css({
      "background-color": COL_ACCENT, "border-color": COL_ACCENT,
      "color": "white", "font-size": "0.8rem"
    });
  }
}

// ── Bootstrap on DOM ready ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  initDT();

  // Year slider label
  document.getElementById("sel-year").addEventListener("input", function() {
    document.getElementById("year-label").textContent = this.value;
    currentYear = parseInt(this.value);
    render();
  });

  document.getElementById("sel-varx").addEventListener("change", function() {
    currentVarx = this.value; render();
  });
  document.getElementById("sel-vary").addEventListener("change", function() {
    currentVary = this.value; render();
  });
  document.getElementById("sel-country").addEventListener("change", function() {
    currentCountry = this.value; render();
  });

  render(); // initial draw
});
</script>
',
  json_combo, json_eu, json_country,
  PARA$col_other, PARA$col_eu_line, PARA$col_country,
  PARA$col_accent, PARA$col_accent2,
  default_year
))
```
